TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_ipay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.TRANSL: 我要講一個摘芭樂的人的故事.
I'm going to tell a story about a person who plucked guavas.

S.FORM: ya kmyala nani pizianna ta tatawlaqanna tmabu nani.
S.PHON: ja kmjara nani piz~rianna ta tatawraqanna tmaβu nani.
S.FORM: ya kmyala nani pizianna ta tatawlaqanna tmabu nani.
S.PHON: ja kmjara nani piz~rianna ta tatawraqanna tmaβu nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他(把芭樂)放在圍裙包起來.

S.TRANSL: 他 放在圍裙包起來.
He put guavas in his apron and wrapped them in it.
He went down and toppled the basket.

S.FORM: taqeRawasan nani puniRti wiyati uman nani wiyati sbabaw.
S.PHON: taqəʁawasan nani puniʁti wijati uman nani wijati sβaβaw.
S.FORM: taqeRawasan nani puniRti wiyati uman nani wiyati sbabaw.
S.PHON: taqəʁawasan nani puniʁti wijati uman nani wijati sβaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: (The basket) was full. (He) climbed up again.

S.FORM: wiyati m mRaRiwpaiku zinna mqazitinsya nani.
S.PHON: wijati m mʁaʁiwpaiku z~rinna mqaz~ritinsja nani.
S.FORM: wiyati m mRaRiwpaiku zinna mqazitinsya nani.
S.PHON: wijati m mʁaʁiwpaiku z~rinna mqaz~ritinsja nani.
S.TRANSL: 他想說,我要騎腳踏車逃走.
'I'm going to run away, riding the bike,' he thought.

S.FORM: akaw nianti byabas taqa zinna unay na kmiyalaay.
S.PHON: akaw nianti βjaβas taqa z~rinna unaj na kmijaraaj.
S.FORM: akaw nianti byabas taqa zinna unay na kmiyalaay.
S.PHON: akaw nianti βjaβas taqa z~rinna unaj na kmijaraaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個摘芭樂的人說,唉呦,芭樂到哪去了?
'Alas, where are the guavas?' said the person who plucked guavas.

S.FORM: kmyalati uman pasaniannati s sepezananti taqeRawasan nani.
S.PHON: kmjarati uman pasaniannati s səpəz~rananti taqəʁawasan nani.
S.FORM: kmyalati uman pasaniannati s sepezananti taqeRawasan nani.
S.PHON: kmjarati uman pasaniannati s səpəz~rananti taqəʁawasan nani.

TRANSL.notes: He plucked (guavas) and put them into the basket.

S.TRANSL: He plucked and put them into the basket.

S.FORM: wiyati tungawanna qazitinsya tmungaw pasani pasa lepaw u tanian smani Raynguan.
S.PHON: wijati tuŋawanna qaz~ritinsja tmuŋaw pasani pasa rəpaw u tanian smani ʁajŋuan.
S.FORM: wiyati tungawanna qazitinsya tmungaw pasani pasa lepaw u tanian smani Raynguan.
S.PHON: wijati tuŋawanna qaz~ritinsja tmuŋaw pasani pasa rəpaw u tanian smani ʁajŋuan.

TRANSL.notes: 他騎著單車,要送(芭樂)到哪裡,我不清楚,我不知道.

S.TRANSL: 他騎著單車,要送 到哪裡,我不清楚,我不知道.

TRANSL.notes: He rode the bike and sent (guavas) to his house or somewhere. I'm not sure. I don't know.

S.TRANSL: He rode the bike and sent to his house or somewhere. I'm not sure. I don't know.

S.FORM: nianati mai maiiku tmayta tu maynep mRayngu sikawma.
S.PHON: nianati mai maiiku tmajta tu majnəp mʁajŋu sikawma.
S.FORM: nianati mai maiiku tmayta tu maynep mRayngu sikawma.
S.PHON: nianati mai maiiku tmajta tu majnəp mʁajŋu sikawma.

TRANSL.notes: 我沒有看到(後面),(我可能)睡著了,(我)不會講.

S.TRANSL: 我沒有看到 , 睡著了, 不會講.

TRANSL.notes: I didn't watch (the latter part). (Maybe I) fell asleep. (I) don't know what to say.

S.TRANSL: I didn't watch . fell asleep. don't know what to say.
